content.en:
"Where did these creatures come from?"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

Normally, he hadn't seen any of these creatures at all, and they were supposed to be hiding in extremely secluded places and sleeping all the time.

"This is not a coincidence that this has occurred in the entire reincarnation domain, the land of eternity, and even the ruins of reincarnation, it should be that the existence outside the prison used a special way to awaken them and let them kill everything!"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, these creatures do not kill each other.

Moreover, he found that these creatures now have no intelligence, and are completely killing machines.

The forces on the other side of the Eternal Shore are very weak, and those overlord-level forces can only activate the Great Array to protect themselves, and they dare not go out.

Only Ye Tian went around to help and kill these creatures.

Fortunately, the number of such creatures in the land of the other side of eternity is not very large, and they are all relatively weak, and there is not a single one comparable to the overlord of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian easily killed them all.

But.

The number of reincarnation gold worms in the ruins of reincarnation is relatively large, and he can't kill them all in a short time, so he can only kill them slowly.

And the reincarnation golden worm is also of good value, he is ready to let a group of Tianshan Pavilion members enter the ruins of reincarnation, he kills the reincarnation golden worm and takes away the origin stone of the reincarnation golden worm.

These Origin Stones were of no use to him, but they were priceless treasures to the members of the Tianshan Pavilion, and they could greatly increase their strength.

Even though it is difficult to break through the realm now, there are a large number of reincarnation golden worm origin stones, which can still forcibly break their shackles.

Soon.

The branch of Tianshan Pavilion in the Ruins of Reincarnation has been established, and Ye Tian's copy body sits here.

And the other replica bodies slashed these reincarnation gold worms everywhere in the ruins of reincarnation.

this day.

A reincarnation golden worm comparable to the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord appeared, and if the other Nine Awakening Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlords encountered this reincarnation golden worm, it would be really troublesome.

However, for Ye Tian, this reincarnation golden insect is also just an ant.

Rumble!!!!

One of Ye Tian's hands turned into a monstrous giant hand, instantly pinching the reincarnation golden worm, and the power of the Dao rules suppressed it.

No matter how much this reincarnation gold worm resists, it can't escape.

Click!

Ye Tian pinched it and directly crushed this reincarnation golden worm, and this reincarnation golden worm tried to recover, but was crushed again.

Soon, this reincarnation gold worm died completely.

"With my current strength, it's too easy to kill the reincarnation golden worm of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord level!"

This Origin Stone in the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord Body is of some use to him, and he directly gives the Origin Stone to another copy body to refine, and he can also improve his cultivation a little.

......

Reincarnation domain.

The three clans of reincarnation are miserable, a large number of clansmen have fallen, and those slave races are too weak to become cannon fodder, and can only slightly contain some weak creatures such as reincarnation gold worms.

Reincarnation of the ancient mountain.

Azu came back from a serious injury.

This time the injury was very serious, and I was coughing up blood on the way back.

"Yazu, are you alright?"

A high-ranking member of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan asked.

"It's okay, I've been besieged by two reincarnation golden worms from the Nine Awakening Origin Realm!" Yazu said helplessly.

If he is at his peak, he is not afraid.

It's a pity that the last time the prison was forced to break the prison formation, he was not lightly injured, and this time it was at the cost of injury to intercept those reincarnation gold worms, titan giant worms and devouring black worms, which was naturally a little difficult to deal with.

Now.

He needed to heal as soon as possible, and he had to go to the aid of the other people.

Now almost all the clansmen who remain on the ancient mountain of reincarnation are not lightly injured, otherwise they would have gone to support a long time ago.

A period of time passed, and a piece of news came.

"Ganzu has fallen!"

Hearing the news, Yazu and the others were shocked.

Ganzu is an overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has broken the boundaries of the nine origins, and he is from the side of the reincarnation source clan, but the fall of Ganzu is not a good thing, it means that the power of the three reincarnation clans has weakened again.

Afterwards.

Bad news came one after another.

The Nine Awakenings of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord have fallen one after another.

Of course, there are also nine awakenings to the reincarnation golden worm, the titan giant worm and the devouring black worm at the level of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, but it is not a good thing for the three clans of reincarnation to continue in this way.

At that time, even if these insect creatures are destroyed, the three reincarnation clans will completely decline!

Now it is different from the past, the origin of the reincarnation domain has plummeted, the energy has plummeted, and it is difficult to breed various precious resources, and the difficulty of breaking through is far greater than before.

In the future, it is still unknown whether a new Nine Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord will be born.

Therefore, once the three clans of reincarnation fall, I am afraid it will be difficult to recover.

If you don't resist, you can't do it, these creatures such as the reincarnation gold worm, the titan giant worm and the devouring black worm kill everything, and they are forced to resist.

......

Somewhere in the domain of reincarnation.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen's copy body was also killing with the reincarnation gold worms, but the area he was responsible for was not so dangerous.

"The three clans of reincarnation are miserable, I am afraid that they will completely decline in the future, and the existence outside the prison is too ruthless!" Ye Tian muttered.

Obviously, the existence outside the prison is to make the reincarnation domain completely decline, and it is no longer possible to break out of the prison and destroy the prison.

Time passed slowly, and millions of primeval epochs passed in the blink of an eye.

During this period of time, the number of reincarnation golden worms, titan giant worms, and devouring black worms has decreased significantly, and the time for these creatures to be completely wiped out is approaching, but the strength of the three reincarnation clans has also been greatly reduced, and the level of the fallen Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords alone has reached more than twenty.

As for the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, the three clans have fallen by a total of no less than 200,000.

The slave races were even more miserable, and seventy percent of the slave races were wiped out.

Of course.

Even with such a weakening, the three clans of reincarnation are still not comparable to the land on the other side of eternity.

Hundreds of thousands of years have passed, and this crisis has been completely resolved.

......

Outside the prison.

The Chaos Sea Array Master said, "The killing mechanism is gone!"

"These little insects still have some strength, but they should also suffer heavy losses, there is no way to toss anymore, and when the Chaos Sea Array Master repairs the forbidden path array, they can continue to absorb the origin here, water the fruit, and then they can harvest the fruit." Shadow said.

"Well, then I'll continue to repair the Forbidden Dao Great Array!"

The Chaos Sea Array Master said.

And just when the Chaos Sea Array Master was repairing the Forbidden Dao Great Array, Ye Tian's true body copy body came to the Reincarnation Domain.

He had come this time to ask for prison fragments from the three reincarnation clans, and he needed these prison fragments to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao.
